name: Chris Perry's Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Sliced pepperoni, cut into halves or quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and chill the pasta according to package instructions. Add the chopped vegetables and other ingredients.
2. About 1 hour before serving, add the Presto Italian dressing and toss gently until well combined.
3. Salt and season to taste.
